name: Syed Hassan Ahmed
title: Data Scientist • Data Analyst • ServiceNow Developer • AR Developer • Researcher

about.headline: I am currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Data Science and actively seeking opportunities to apply my skills in data analytics and business intelligence. I specialize in transforming raw data into meaningful insights using SQL, Python, and visualization tools such as Power BI and Tableau. My experience includes ETL processes, data cleaning, reporting, and dashboard development within Agile and SDLC environments. I enjoy solving real-world problems through data-driven approaches, automation, and analytics, while continuously strengthening my skills in data engineering, cloud platforms (GCP/AWS), and modern data tools. I am committed to delivering accurate, scalable, and impactful solutions that support informed decision-making.

education.school: University of St. Thomas, MN, USA

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
education.school: Arya College of Engineering & I.T., RJ, India
